<!-- Thanks for contributing to Easy Web Navigation! Please keep PRs focused. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New scanner rule
- [ ] Feature / enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is **focused** (one logical change).
- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm build:firefox` passes (if relevant).
- [ ] **No** broad host-permission expansion (`activeTab` / `scripting` / `storage` only).
- [ ] **No** AI added (unless explicitly approved in an issue).
- [ ] **No** speech added (unless explicitly approved in an issue).
- [ ] **No** auto-fix / inspected-page DOM mutation added (unless explicitly approved).
- [ ] **No** legal-compliance claim added ("certified"/"compliant"/"guaranteed").
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md`, `docs/`, `CHANGELOG.md` as needed).
- [ ] `HANDOVER.txt` updated (if part of the maintainer phase workflow).

## Accessibility notes

<!-- For rule changes: WCAG criterion, failing/passing HTML examples, false-positive risks. -->

## Screenshots (if UI changes, and only if safe to share)
